answers: Keto diet: very low carb (under 50g/day), high fat, moderate protein. Body enters ketosis and burns fat for fuel.
Keto foods: meat, fish, eggs, butter, cheese, nuts, avocado, low-carb vegetables. Avoid bread, rice, pasta, sugar.
Benefits: rapid weight loss, reduced appetite, stable blood sugar, improved mental clarity. But hard to maintain long-term.
Keto caution: first 1-2 weeks may cause 'keto flu' (headache, fatigue). Stay hydrated and supplement electrolytes.
